keyFindings.title: Codex live hook registration is misaligned with the phase-3 Codex adapter target
keyFindings.recommendation: Phase 3 must explicitly include .codex/hooks.json rewiring/verification, or declare the live hook file out of scope with an owner.

keyFindings.title: Gemini exclusion is undocumented and contradicted by phase-3 allowlist wording
keyFindings.recommendation: Remove Gemini from phase-3 scope and document it as a non-goal, or promote it to a real requirement with files and acceptance criteria.

keyFindings.title: Phase 3 should enumerate live runtime config paths during planning
keyFindings.recommendation: Use a concrete runtime config checklist rather than a generic runtime-permission-config row.

keyFindings.title: Sibling CLI shims should inherit per-service short socket defaults
keyFindings.recommendation: Track as a program-level checklist item; spec-memory itself already owns the short `/tmp/mk-spec-memory` default.

ruledOutDirections.approach: Report MCP removal or 93-file migration as gaps
ruledOutDirections.reason: Both are program non-goals for the dual-stack window.

ruledOutDirections.approach: Report missing OpenCode spec-memory plugin as an unowned gap
ruledOutDirections.reason: Phase 3 explicitly owns creating the plugin and bridge.
Implementation phase packets are planned-state; the audit charter excludes this.
